channel.title: Comments for page "Super Stars!"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Super Stars!"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I would very highly recommend reading tales on the site. They can be quite varied and interesting, and bring out the depth in SCPs that you enjoy! See this link to explore the wonderful world of tales. If you want to read tales about specific SCPs you enjoy, instead of sifting through all tales, you should also take a look at [www.scp-wiki.net/scp-series-1-tales-edition this] (or any other series tale list for SCPs you like). I hope you enjoy!

Also, if you really did mean to ask why instead of what; it's because anyone can write tales about Foundationverse stuff, especially SCPs.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is a tale about SCP-1802 and SCP-2300, there's more than just SCPs on this site.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Pssst why does this have anything to do with SCP?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: If nothing else, this means I successfully wrote in the tone of the series and I couldn't be happier about that!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Holy shit I was trying to explain the feeling but this is it exactly. Vintage 2014 my guys.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Man, reading this tale was like that scene in Ratatouille where the mean food critic tries the dish and has a flashback. Brought me right back to the days when Learning the Alphabet was still ongoing.

Even if the series is not going to continue, thank you for posting this Deci. Its an excellent tale in its own right.

+1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: You had me there, I was super hyped for some more Learning the Alphabet. Alas, this'll do. Great tale, Decibelles, though I believe you meant to crosslink to SCP-2300 instead of SCP-2000.

item.title: Author Post - I'm not famous, no.
item.content:encoded:
No, this tale series will not continue. I've just had dibs on doing this intermission for years now and only recently had inspiration strike thanks to kaktus's Very Unofficial Contest. I didn't make it on time, so when I realized that, I just made the tale longer! And better! I hope.

Thanks to the following:

  • TwistedGears for looking it over before I posted.
